serialPortHelp: Device path of the DuoFern USB stick, for example /dev/serial/by-id/... or COM5.
baudRateHelp: Serial baud rate for the DuoFern USB stick. Usually 115200.
dongleSerialHelp: Six-digit DuoFern radio code of the USB stick, for example 6F1A6F. This is not the USB serial number.
deviceCodesHelp: Comma-separated list of DuoFern device codes. The adapter can also learn devices automatically.
autoCreateHelp: Automatically create ioBroker objects when a known or new DuoFern device is detected.
initOnStartHelp: Send the DuoFern initialization sequence when the adapter starts.
statusOnStartHelp: Request device status after the adapter has started.
statusAfterCommandHelp: Poll the device status after movement or control commands.
periodicStatusPollHelp: Regularly poll all known DuoFern devices for current status values.
periodicStatusPollMsHelp: Interval for periodic status polling in milliseconds.
externalActivityPollAll: Poll all devices after external activity
externalActivityPollAllHelp: Poll known devices after telegrams from remotes or sensors when the affected actuator cannot be identified clearly.
ackIncomingHelp: Send ACK telegrams back to the DuoFern stick after receiving telegrams.
debugRawHelp: Write raw DuoFern RX/TX telegrams to the debug log.
flushPartialMsHelp: Time before incomplete serial receive buffers are discarded.
readAnswerTimeoutMsHelp: Timeout while waiting for answers during initialization and commands.
commandTimeoutMsHelp: Maximum time for queued commands before they are considered failed.
reconnectIntervalMsHelp: Delay before trying to reopen the serial port after connection loss.
